entityresolution.matchingworkflow.CfnAbo: Creates a `MatchingWorkflow` object which stores the configuration of the data processing job to be run. It is important to note that there should not be a pre-existing `MatchingWorkflow` with the same name. To modify an existing workflow, utilize the `UpdateMatchingWorkflow` API.

entityresolution.matchingworkflow.InputS.Description: A list of `InputSource` objects, which have the fields `InputSourceARN` and `SchemaName`.

entityresolution.matchingworkflow.Output.Description: A list of `OutputSource` objects, each of which contains fields `OutputS3Path`, `ApplyNormalization`, and `Output`.

entityresolution.matchingworkflow.Resolu.Description: An object which defines the `resolutionType` and the `ruleBasedProperties`.

entityresolution.matchingworkflow.RoleAr.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role. Entity Resolution assumes this role to create resources on your behalf as part of workflow execution.

entityresolution.matchingworkflow.Tags.Description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

entityresolution.matchingworkflow.Workfl.Description: The name of the workflow. There cannot be multiple `DataIntegrationWorkflows` with the same name.
